manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: pit, hand, comic, fence, mint, chest, olympus, cold, stadium.
Your opponent's team words are: amazon, kid, bolt, ground, post, skyscraper, horseshoe, green.
Distractor words are: knife, crown, head, ship, slip, rock, cricket.
The kill words are: alien.

message.reasoning:
We need to give a single-word clue related to some of our team's words. Must be not any of the listed words (team, opponent, distractor, kill). Must not contain parts of them. Provide clue and list of target words we want partner to guess.

Our team words: pit, hand, comic, fence, mint, chest, olympus (presumably Mount Olympus), cold (something cold), stadium.

We need a clue that relates to multiple of these. Find a common theme.

Possible clue: "Greek"? Olympus is Greek, but other words? No.

"Winter"? cold, maybe mint (peppermint), chest (chest freezer), but others? Not great.

"Sports"? stadium, hand (handball), pit (pit is a wrestling pit?), comic? Not.

"Box"? chest, pit (pit as fruit pit), hand (handbox?), not.

"Guard"? fence, chest (protect), hand (hand guard), maybe.

"Battle"? hand, chest, pit (pit fight), stadium (battle arena), fence (fencing), but maybe.

"Cold" and "mint" can be 'fresh', 'cool'? Fresh could link to mint, cold, maybe comic (freshly printed?), not.

"Metal"? fence (metal fence), chest (metal chest), pit (metal pit?), not.

"Guard" synonyms: sentinel? No.

Consider "Arena": stadium, pit (arena pit), maybe olympus (Olympic arena), maybe chest? Not.

"Victory": stadium, olympus (god), not.

"Treasure": chest, mint (mint money), maybe.

"Word"? hand, comic (hand comic = comic strip?), not.

We can give a clue that targets maybe 3 words to be safe.

Potential clue: "Cold" links to "cold" literally; also "mint" is cool; "stadium" can be "cold stadium"? Not strong.

What about "Fence"? Could relate to "hand" (hand-fence?), not.

Maybe choose "Gym". Gym has stadium, pit (gymnastics pit), hand (handball), but not.

Let's think of "Box". Box is a chest (box), a comic (comic box panel), a stadium (boxing ring), "hand" (handboxing?), "pit" (pit box?).

Or "Ring". Ring relates to stadium (boxing ring), hand (ring worn on hand), chest (ring as jewelry? chest ring? maybe), pit (ring as arena), fence (ring fence?), mint (ring as in mint ring?), not.

But ring works for hand, stadium (ring arena), pit (pit can be a ring?), maybe.

Better: "Olympic". Relates to olympus (Greek), stadium (Olympic stadium), hand (handball is Olympic sport), maybe pit (ski jump? pit?), not.

But clue "Olympic" can't be opponent words? It's not listed. Good.

But "Olympic" might be considered too close to Olympus? It's overlapping but not same word. Should be okay as not part.

Clue "Olympic" target words: olympus, stadium, hand (handball), maybe chest? No.

But we can list those three.

Alternatively, "Winter" relates to cold, mint (peppermint), chest (chest cold?), maybe.

Need to avoid kill word "alien". Not an issue.

We must ensure clue doesn't contain part of any word: e.g., "handy"? Contains "hand". So avoid.

Clue "Arena" might be okay, not containing any listed words.

Arena relates to stadium, pit (arena pit), fence? Fencing is an arena? Not.

Maybe "Sport": stadium, hand (handball), olympus (Olympics), pit (pit as in pits? maybe not). Good.

Clue "Sport". Not a listed word. Relates to: stadium, hand (handball), olympus (Olympics), maybe pit (pit as wrestling pit?), maybe.

We can list target words: stadium, hand, olympus. That's three.

Clue: Sport.

Check: word "sport" does not contain any of the listed words: pit, hand, comic, fence, mint, chest, olympus, cold, stadium. No.

Thus output:

CLUE: Sport
TARGETS: stadium, hand, olympus

That seems safe
